title: epipactis schlechtendaliana
intro: Epipactis schlechtendaliana, also known as Schlechter's helleborine, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Epipactis genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Epipactis schlechtendaliana include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
